## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` and `npm run format` (in `frontend/`) with no errors
- [ ] I ran `npm test` and `npm run build` successfully
- [ ] New designs were created via `npm run new:design` and registered correctly
- [ ] Content renders correctly in both light and dark themes
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
